name: iFlytek Spark V1.0 (Xinghuo)
note: iFlytek's first Spark cognitive model, one of China's earliest ChatGPT challengers; launched with speech I/O, image understanding added later in 2023.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real launch event: multiple independent sources (Baidu Baike, chinaz.com announcement of the May 6 2023 release conference, and general web search corroboration) confirm iFlytek held its 'Xinghuo (Spark) Cognitive Large Model' achievement release conference on 2023-05-06, matching the record. The originally-cited news.cri.cn source could not be re-confirmed (it discusses a later SuperCLUE ranking, not the initial release), so it was replaced with a source that directly corroborates the release date; params/architecture remain correctly undisclosed (closed proprietary model), and no benchmark result rows were included, consistent with none being verifiable for this early proprietary release.
